ddls:
CREATE TABLE "farms" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farm */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the farm */,
  "total_land_area" REAL /* Total land area of the farm in hectares */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the farm */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the farm was established */,
  "farm_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farm manager */,
  "farm_type" TEXT /* Type of farm (e.g., organic, non-organic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farms_farm_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_manager_id") REFERENCES farm_managers ("farm_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production cost entry */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farm */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., Variable, Fixed) */,
  "particulars" TEXT /* Description of the cost particulars */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost incurred */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the cost report */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of production (e.g., winter, summer) */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crop produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_costs_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labor_costs" (
  "labor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each labor cost entry */,
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production cost entry */,
  "labor_type" TEXT /* Type of labor (e.g., Human, Bullock, Power Tiller) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of labor (e.g., Days, Hours) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of labor used */,
  "rate_per_unit" REAL /* Rate per unit of labor */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of labor */,
  "labor_date" TEXT /* Date when labor was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("labor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labor_costs_cost_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_id") REFERENCES production_costs ("cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machinery_costs" (
  "machinery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machinery cost entry */,
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production cost entry */,
  "machinery_type" TEXT /* Type of machinery (e.g., Power Tiller, Tractor) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of machinery use (e.g., Hours, Days) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of machinery used */,
  "rate_per_unit" REAL /* Rate per unit of machinery */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of machinery */,
  "machinery_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the machinery (e.g., new, used) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machinery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machinery_costs_cost_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_id") REFERENCES production_costs ("cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_costs" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material cost entry */,
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production cost entry */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., Seeds, Fertilizers, Pesticides) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of material (e.g., Kilograms, Liters) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of material used */,
  "rate_per_unit" REAL /* Rate per unit of material */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of material */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_costs_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_costs_cost_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_id") REFERENCES production_costs ("cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fixed_costs" (
  "fixed_cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fixed cost entry */,
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production cost entry */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of fixed cost (e.g., Rent, Equipment Maintenance) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of fixed cost (e.g., Months, Years) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of fixed cost (e.g., 1 for rent per month) */,
  "rate_per_unit" REAL /* Rate per unit of fixed cost */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of fixed cost */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of payment (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fixed_cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixed_costs_cost_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_id") REFERENCES production_costs ("cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the cost category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., farm manager, financial analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "page_visited" TEXT /* Page visited by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farm */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "variable_costs" REAL /* Total variable costs */,
  "fixed_costs" REAL /* Total fixed costs */,
  "total_costs" REAL /* Total production costs */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the financial report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for cost optimization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost version */,
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production cost entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the cost data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_versions_cost_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_id") REFERENCES production_costs ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farm_managers" (
  "farm_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farm manager */,
  "farm_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm manager */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farm */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the farm manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the farm manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_manager_id")
)
